name: Aldwyn the Merchant
greeting: A round-faced man in a patchwork coat waves you over. 'Welcome! Aldwyn's Sundries — best prices in Millbrook, or so I keep telling myself. Looking for supplies?'

dialogue.response: 'I carry the basics — healing herbs if you're roughed up, and a reliable health potion for the long hauls. Type: shop aldwyn'
'Heard the guild's paying out three bounties right now. Something about goblins, an orc, and something worse out in the ruins. None of my business — I just sell goods.'
